output.model_sql: SELECT seller_id, event_date, listing_id, SUM(quantity) as total_quantity, SUM(proceeds) as total_proceeds FROM stg_seller_events GROUP BY 1, 2, 3

decision_log.decision: Gathered full model context from DBT_MODELS and GitHub
decision_log.rationale: Model is an incremental materialization owned by @dustin.thomas, tagged hourly/pos. Upstream is stg_seller_events. No recent commits in last 48h.

tool_calls.input: SELECT NAME, MATERIALIZATION, SCHEMA_NAME, TAGS, JSON_EXTRACT_PATH_TEXT(META, 'owner') as owner FROM DW.DATAOPS_DBT.DBT_MODELS WHERE NAME = 'seller_event_day_listing_agg'
